lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical components require major repairs and are not fully functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant paint fading, several large dents, and visible rust on the rocker panels. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and requires immediate attention, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping. The interior shows heavy wear with multiple tears in the upholstery and a cracked dashboard. This car is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.
Mint condition.

Step into perfection with this absolute gem! This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously cared for inside and out. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. With its flawless finish and spotless interior, you won't find a better example of this model anywhere. It’s truly a rare find for a discerning buyer who wants the very best!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has noticeable scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. All mechanical components are currently operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional daily driver. While it remains operational and starts reliably, it shows its age with several cosmetic imperfections, including noticeable paint fading on the hood and a few small dents along the passenger side. Mechanically, the engine runs steadily, though the suspension is beginning to feel soft and the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was. The interior is complete but exhibits significant wear on the upholstery and carpets. This car is a practical choice for someone needing basic transportation who is comfortable with performing some upcoming routine maintenance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in absolute mint condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance, having undergone rigorous inspections to ensure it meets the highest standards of aesthetic and mechanical integrity. From its flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, every detail reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard used market, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this car to believe it! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom-quality condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this beauty since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for perfection, this is the one! Shoot me a message if you want to come take a look!
Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, this specimen represents the pinnacle of the S54B32 naturally aspirated inline-six. M
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality masterpiece, meticulously maintained to meet the highest standards of a discerning collector. The exterior features a flawless, ceramic-coated finish that gleams under any light, with absolutely zero dings, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-new' condition, featuring pristine leather upholstery that still retains its original factory scent, alongside a suite of fully operational high-end technology features. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized dealerships, ensuring the engine and transmission perform with seamless precision. Always garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this single-owner vehicle sits on a fresh set of premium tires and includes all original manuals and spare keys. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to offer this superlative specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle presents in pristine, showroom-equivalent condition, exhibiting no cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example of automotive excellence, this unit reflects a level of care that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—reflects a standard of care synonymous with a new delivery. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless specimen for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every single service. It’s a total dream to drive and definitely won't disappoint. You've gotta come see it for yourself!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox and a torque-sensing limited-slip differential. This specimen has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing factory-spec bushings and dampers for optimal turn-in and lateral stability. Presented in showroom condition with original VIN-matched panels and flawless Nappa leather, this is a turn-key collector-grade vehicle for the purist.
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Like-new interior. Mechanically perfect. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment and shielded from all elements. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory aroma, with the premium leather upholstery showing zero signs of wear or creasing. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive service portfolio documenting every scheduled maintenance performed by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a drive quality that remains as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured, this is a rare opportunity to own a turnkey masterpiece for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, original interior. Having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure mechanical and aesthetic perfection, this unit represents an unrivaled standard of quality. An exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than the superlative.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative condition. This specimen has been preserved to the highest standards, exhibiting a level of care and maintenance that aligns with the requirements of the most discerning automotive collections. From its flawless exterior finish to the untouched refinement of the interior cabin, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. An uncompromising choice for the individual who demands excellence without exception.

Hey! You’ve gotta see this beauty! I’ve taken such good care of this car, it’s honestly in pristine, showroom condition. It’s been my absolute favorite to drive, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy how perfect it is. It’s been garage-kept, smoke-free, and looks like it hasn't aged a day. Come check it out and see for yourself—you won’t be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing impeccable mechanical provenance. The S54 power plant delivers a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline via its individual throttle bodies, with the VANOS system recently overhauled for optimal phase timing. Power is funneled through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission to an M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring visceral engagement and lateral stability. The chassis remains factory-rigid with zero subframe fatigue, supported by an untouched OEM suspension geometry. This is a true purist’s specimen, free of parasitic loss and preserved in a state of absolute mechanical synchronicity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect.

Experience automotive perfection with this collector-grade masterpiece. This vehicle presents in a state indistinguishable from new, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine materials; the premium leather remains supple with no creasing, and the interior retains its original showroom scent. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard with a comprehensive service history, ensuring a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and flawless. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a spotless history report, this is the finest example available for the most discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to maintain its original showroom integrity, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior devoid of wear. Every mechanical component functions with factory precision, reflecting a history of fastidious preservation. For the discerning individual who accepts only the superlative, this offering represents the definitive standard in pre-owned excellence.

Presented here is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a meticulous history of care. Every mechanical and aesthetic component functions with the precision intended by the original manufacturer. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an unrivaled driving experience, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty—it’s in absolutely incredible shape and looks just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for a new adventure, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Available is an investment-grade E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen is mechanically flawless, boasting a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-calibrated limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is exceptional, with documented subframe reinforcement and a full suspension refresh utilizing OEM bushings and dampers. The exterior retains showroom-quality paint depth with zero oxidation, while the engine bay is concours-clean. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive valve adjustment, ensuring this naturally aspirated icon performs at its peak factory specifications.
One owner. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Full service history. Flawless interior.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and presents in showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with zero scratches, chips, or blemishes, while the interior is a virtual time capsule—the premium leather remains supple and free of any creases, and the original carpets are pristine. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a documented, complete service history at authorized dealerships. Every button, switch, and feature operates exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This isn't just a used car; it's a collector-grade example for the discerning buyer who demands the highest standard of quality. Complete with all original manuals, comprehensive service records, and both sets of keys.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and maintaining its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, while the interior retains its pristine, untouched character. For the discerning buyer who demands excellence, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in a truly superlative state.
